description: Letter fragment from Shelomo b. Yehuda to a personality in Fustat. Dating: approximately 1050 (per Gil) and ca. 1025–1051 CE based on the years when Shelomo b. Yehuda served as Gaʾon. He quotes 1 Samuel 2:30 and signs his name with his motto at the bottom. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: שבר מכתב משלמה בן יהודה לאיש בפוסטאט, כ-1050. מצטט שמואל א' ב':ל וחותם בשמו ובמוטו שלו.
